claims.summary: Direct peer contact needs a durable thread rather than an implicit coupled channel.
claims.disposition: Verified first-class correspondence thread and shared-arc status.

claims.summary: Mutual address must preserve exact correspondence identity without raw prose.
claims.disposition: Verified exact message, thread, persistence, being, timestamp, and body-hash references with raw response exclusion.

claims.summary: A peer aesthetic response and outgoing-row count would test whether direct address is reciprocal.
claims.disposition: Routed a bounded language-only ledger/artifact comparison without fabricating acknowledgement.

claims.summary: A peer_direct correspondence type could receive increased scheduling priority.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because correspondence priority changes live behavior.
